vBRIEFInfo.author: overdeck/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-2155: Decompose src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx (1620 lines) into focused modules

plan.title: Decompose MessagesTimeline.tsx (1620 lines) into focused modules
plan.author: agent:claude-opus-4-8

narratives.Problem: src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx is 1620 lines — over the 1,000-line file-size guard. It mixes search-highlight DOM utilities, time/duration formatters, the virtualized container component, the per-row dispatcher, the individual row renderers, the work-log tool renderers, and the divider/indicator components in one file.
narratives.Proposal: Pure relocation behind a barrel. Extract cohesive symbol groups into sibling modules under a new camelCase directory chat/messagesTimeline/, one bead per module, and leave chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx as a thin re-export barrel. Dependency order: leaf helpers (constants, format, searchHighlight, types) -> row/divider components (messageRows, workLogRows, dividers) -> the per-row dispatcher (TimelineRowRenderer) -> the main component, which is then moved out and the original file collapsed to re-exports. No logic edits, no renamed exports, no call-site changes. typecheck + lint + the full vitest suite must be green after every seam.
narratives.NonGoals:
- No logic edits, no renamed or removed exports, no behavior change (pure moves + re-exports only).
- Do NOT move or modify MessagesTimeline.logic.ts (already a separate sub-1000 sibling referenced as ./MessagesTimeline.logic).
- No changes to any importing call site (TerminalPanel.tsx, ConversationPanel.tsx, CommandDeck/SessionView/SessionPanel.tsx, lib/deriveRoundMarkers.ts, the test).
- No new tests, no test-behavior changes.
- No eslint-any-allowlist.json edits (the file currently contains zero `any`).

autoDecisions.rationale: Matches existing camelCase component-dir precedent (sessionFeed/, autopreso/) and avoids a name collision between the barrel file MessagesTimeline.tsx and a same-name MessagesTimeline/ directory, which some tooling resolves ambiguously.

autoDecisions.summary: chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx becomes a pure thin barrel; the component body moves to chat/messagesTimeline/MessagesTimeline.tsx.
autoDecisions.rationale: The issue prefers a 'thin re-export barrel'. Although the component alone (~650 lines incl. imports) is already under 1000, a pure barrel is the cleaner, unambiguous target and keeps every importer resolving unchanged.

autoDecisions.summary: Decompose into 9 beads (one per cohesive module + a final barrelize bead) rather than fewer larger beads.
autoDecisions.rationale: Each module is an independently reviewable, independently mergeable pure move that leaves the tree green; the planning guidance favors aggressive decomposition for refactors.

Each bead is a mechanical pure relocation; a wrong move surfaces immediately at typecheck/lint/full-suite rather than as silent foundation rot, so the inspection gate adds cost without catching a judgment-call defect.

items.title: Extract module constants to messagesTimeline/constants.ts

narrative.Action: Create chat/messagesTimeline/constants.ts exporting MAX_VISIBLE_WORK_LOG_ENTRIES, ALWAYS_UNVIRTUALIZED_TAIL_ROWS, AUTO_SCROLL_THRESHOLD_PX (currently MessagesTimeline.tsx:45-47). Remove the inline definitions from MessagesTimeline.tsx and import them from the new module.

items.title: messagesTimeline/constants.ts contains and exportsthe three numeric constants MAX_VISIBLE_WORK_LOG_ENTRIES, ALWAYS_UNVIRTUALIZED_TAIL_ROWS, AUTO_SCROLL_THRESHOLD_PX
MessagesTimeline.tsx no longer contains those constants inline and instead imports them from ./messagesTimeline/constants
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npx vitest run --configLoader runner each exits 0 with 0 tests failed
Extract time/duration formatters to messagesTimeline/format.ts

narrative.Action: Create chat/messagesTimeline/format.ts exporting formatTimestamp and formatElapsed (currently MessagesTimeline.tsx:151-177). Remove the inline definitions and import them from the new module.

MessagesTimeline.tsx imports formatTimestamp/formatElapsed from ./messagesTimeline/format and no longer contains them inline
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npx vitest run --configLoader runner each exits 0 with 0 tests failed
Extract search-highlight DOM utilities to messagesTimeline/searchHighlight.ts

narrative.Action: Create chat/messagesTimeline/searchHighlight.ts exporting stringifyToolInput, escapeRegex, extractSearchHighlightTerms, escapeDataAttributeValue, clearSearchHighlights, highlightSearchTermsInElement, getRowSearchText, and the SEARCH_HIGHLIGHT_CLASS / SEARCH_HIGHLIGHT_ATTR constants (currently MessagesTimeline.tsx:49-148). getRowSearchText needs the MessagesTimelineRow type from ./MessagesTimeline.logic. Remove the inline definitions and import what the component still uses.

Extract public prop/marker types to messagesTimeline/types.ts

Import these types back into MessagesTimeline.tsx. These two types are part of the public barrel surface.

npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npx vitest run --configLoader runner each exits 0 with 0 tests failed

These use formatTimestamp/formatElapsed from ./format and other existing imports (ChatMarkdown, DiffStatLabel, ChangedFilesTree, summarizeTurnDiffStats, etc.). Extract the per-row dispatcher to messagesTimeline/TimelineRowRenderer.tsx

narrative.Action: Create chat/messagesTimeline/TimelineRowRenderer.tsx containing the RowProps interface and the memo'd TimelineRowRenderer (currently MessagesTimeline.tsx:854-901). It imports the row components from ./messageRows and ./workLogRows, the divider/indicator components from ./dividers, PlanCard from ../PlanCard, and the MessagesTimelineRow type from ../MessagesTimeline.logic. Export TimelineRowRenderer. Remove the inline definition from MessagesTimeline.tsx and import it back. Depends on extract-message-rows, extract-worklog-rows, extract-dividers, extract-types being done first.

items.title: messagesTimeline/TimelineRowRenderer.tsx contains and exportsTimelineRowRenderer, importing the row, work-log, and divider components from their new sibling modules
MessagesTimeline.tsx no longer contains TimelineRowRenderer/RowProps inline and imports TimelineRowRenderer from ./messagesTimeline/TimelineRowRenderer
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and npx vitest run --configLoader runner each exits 0 with 0 tests failed
Move the MessagesTimeline component out and collapse the entry to a thin barrel

narrative.Action: Move the MessagesTimeline component (currently MessagesTimeline.tsx:227-851) into chat/messagesTimeline/MessagesTimeline.tsx, importing constants from ./constants, search-highlight helpers from ./searchHighlight, types from ./types, and TimelineRowRenderer from ./TimelineRowRenderer (and the logic/markdown/etc. modules at their relocated relative paths). Then rewrite chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx as a thin barrel: re-export MessagesTimeline (value) from ./messagesTimeline/MessagesTimeline and re-export RoundMarker and MessagesTimelineProps (types) from ./messagesTimeline/types. No call-site changes anywhere.

items.title: chat/messagesTimeline/MessagesTimeline.tsx contains the component and is under 1,000 lines

chat/MessagesTimeline.tsx is reduced to a thin re-export barrel exposing MessagesTimeline, RoundMarker, and MessagesTimelineProps; all five existing importers (TerminalPanel, ConversationPanel, SessionPanel, deriveRoundMarkers, the test) resolve unchanged, which preserves every existing import path with no edits to their import lines
Every file under chat/messagesTimeline/ contains fewer than 1,000 lines and no source file in the changeset exceeds the file-size guard
npm run typecheck, npm run lint, and the full npx vitest run --configLoader runner each exits 0 with 0 tests failed
